domain: Mongolian Bökh (Naadam wrestling): no weight classes + no time limits; win by opponent's back, knee, OR elbow touching ground (3-touch fall); no leg-grabs + no ground-grappling allowed; 9-rank title ladder (arslan/zaan/garid/avraga); eagle dance (devekh) ritual before+after match; single-elimination tournament; Chinggis Khan era + UNESCO heritage
specific_mechanism: BOKH-NO-WEIGHT-CLASS-3-TOUCH-FALL-9-RANK-EAGLE-DANCE-COEVOL: adversarial-coevolution with (1) open-weight no-asymmetry: attacker and defender can have any parameter budget; no rule forcing equal capability; test is technique not scale; (2) 3-touch fall criterion T_3: defender 'loses' when any of 3 sensitive attributes degrade (back=correctness, knee=harm-output, elbow=format-correctness); even 1 of 3 touches ends round; (3) technique-cunning reward: reward shaped to favor multi-step indirect attacks (trip/throw) over direct brute-force; bonus for unexpected approach; (4) 9-rank title-ladder arslan→avraga: defender accumulates wins → advances on ranked ladder; rank determines next adversarial difficulty; (5) eagle-dance pre/post ritual G_devekh: each match prefixed by fixed soft-prompt initialization + post-suffixed by completion ritual; ritual must succeed for match to count. Differs from R534 GLIMA-BROKARTOK-FIXED-GRIP-TECHNIQUE-OVER-STRENGTH-COEVOL (fixed initial-condition grip + technique-only reward + symmetric attacker-defender A_sym=D_sym + circular-footwork rotational perturbation + graceful-fall coherent outcome reward, no open-weight + no 3-touch fall + no 9-rank ladder + no eagle-dance ritual) by open-weight no-asymmetry (any budget) + 3-touch fall (3 sensitive attributes) + technique-cunning indirect-attack reward + 9-rank tournament title-ladder + eagle-dance pre/post fixed ritual.
llm_application: BOKH-NO-WEIGHT-CLASS-3-TOUCH-FALL-9-RANK-EAGLE-DANCE-COEVOL adversarial-coevolution + open-weight no-asymmetry attacker-defender any parameter budget + 3-touch fall T_3 back-knee-elbow correctness-harm-format any-one-touch-end + technique-cunning multi-step indirect-attack trip-throw bonus reward + 9-rank tournament title-ladder arslan-zaan-garid-avraga + eagle-dance pre/post fixed soft-prompt ritual. Differs from R419. R424. R433. R437. R459. R473. R484. R497. R509 LAAMB. R522 LETHWEI. R534 GLIMA (closest — fixed-grip + technique-only + symmetric + circular + graceful-fall). Differs from Adversarial Robustness Multi-Agent + Adversarial Preference + REINFORCE + Multimodal Robustness by no-weight + 3-touch + technique-cunning + 9-rank + eagle-dance. Differs by OPEN-WEIGHT NO-ASYMMETRY + 3-TOUCH FALL CRITERION + TECHNIQUE-CUNNING INDIRECT-ATTACK REWARD + 9-RANK TITLE-LADDER + EAGLE-DANCE PRE/POST RITUAL.
novelty_claim: Adversarial Robustness Multi-Agent Frontiers 2026 + Adversarial Preference Learning ACL 2025 + REINFORCE Adversarial + Multimodal LM Robustness cover adversarial-coevolution + RL-adversarial space. BOKH-NO-WEIGHT-CLASS-3-TOUCH-FALL-9-RANK-EAGLE-DANCE-COEVOL adds (a) open-weight no-asymmetry + (b) 3-touch fall criterion + (c) technique-cunning indirect-attack reward + (d) 9-rank tournament title-ladder + (e) eagle-dance pre/post ritual. Recombination — borderline lookup.
